stemHtml: A pilot looks outside the window and sees a CB and sees a large active cell in the radar display. According to SERA, the pilot…

options.a: Deviate and follow a different course, ATC will then use the new pilot track to give vectors.
options.b: An amended clearance may be obtained to avoid the CB.
options.c: Can fly 5 NM left and descend 1000 ft.
options.d: Can fly 5 NM right and climb 1000 ft.
